top_findings.summary: The skill requests unrestricted Read(*), Write(*), and Edit(*) permissions, allowing access to all files on the system. While the skill's purpose is to guide plugin development (which may involve file operations), full system access is excessive and not justified. Permissions should be restricted to plugin-related directories (e.g., .claude-plugin/**, commands/**, skills/**) or specific file types to adhere to the principle of least privilege. The Bash command permissions (e.g., git, npm) are appropriate, but the broad file access poses unnecessary risk.
